---
title: "Monitoring"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
from analysis.breakout_strategy import run_analysis
from IPython.display import display

analysis = run_analysis()
display(analysis["monitoring_display"])
```

## How We Will Know Performance Is Still In Line

Going forward, the strategy should be monitored through rolling behavior rather than one-off wins and losses. The final project will compare live or forward results against the out-of-sample backtest using:

- rolling expectancy
- rolling hit rate
- rolling Sharpe ratio
- drawdown depth
- holding-period distribution
- outcome mix by trade fate

## How We Will Quantify Breakdown

The strategy will be considered impaired when key rolling metrics fall materially outside their validated range for long enough to suggest regime failure rather than routine noise.

Typical triggers include:

- expectancy turning negative
- hit rate leaving the backtest confidence band
- drawdown exceeding a historical stress threshold
- the model filter no longer improving the baseline breakout rule
